mapper.insert: insert into user_tb (email,user_password, user_name, user_phone, address, created_at, role_id) values (#{email}, #{userPassword} , #{userName}, #{userPhone}, #{address}, now(), 1)
mapper.select: select u.user_id, u.email, u.user_name, u.user_phone, u.address, u.created_at, u.user_password, u.role_id from user_tb u inner join role_tb r on u.role_id = r.role_id where u.user_name = #{userName}
select u.user_id, u.email, u.user_name, u.user_phone, u.address, u.created_at, u.user_password, u.role_id from user_tb u inner join role_tb r on u.role_id = r.role_id where u.email = #{email}
select u.user_id, u.email, u.user_name, u.user_phone, u.address, u.created_at, u.user_password, u.role_id from user_tb u inner join role_tb r on u.role_id = r.role_id where u.user_id = #{userId}
